steps.title: Set the two equations equal
steps.content:
Since both expressions equal $y$, set them equal:
$$4x + 12 = (x+2)^2$$

steps.title: Expand and solve for x²
steps.content:
Expand the right side:
$$(x+2)^2 = x^2 + 4x + 4$$
So the equation becomes:
$$4x + 12 = x^2 + 4x + 4$$
Subtract $4x$ from both sides:
$$12 = x^2 + 4$$
Subtract 4 from both sides:
$$x^2 = 8$$
